goal: Run a deterministic benchmark workflow for Pydantic and validate a narrow repository smoke review without reusing unrelated memory.
test_command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import tomllib
manifest = Path('pyproject.toml')
if not manifest.exists():
    raise SystemExit(1)
data = tomllib.loads(manifest.read_text())
project = data.get('project') or {}
name = project.get('name') or ''
if 'pydantic' not in name.lower():
    raise SystemExit(1)
print(name)
PY
coder_summary: Write a deterministic benchmark marker file before repository review.
